articles.author: Ethan Beck
articles.title: Victor Willis, who fronted the Village People and co-wrote ‘Y.M.C.A.,’ dies at 74 - The Washington Post
articles.description: The singer was a mainstay of the disco group, dressing as a policeman or naval officer while performing hits such as “In the Navy” and “Macho Man.”
articles.content:
Victor Willis, who helped make the Village People one of the most enduring groups of the disco era, singing lead and co-writing hits including Y.M.C.A. and Macho Man, died June 30. He was 74.
His wi… [+194 chars]
